title: teucrium × ochroleucum var. cebennense
intro: Teucrium × ochroleucum var. cebennense, also known as French germander, is a plant species within the genus Teucrium and is a hybrid of Teucrium chamaedrys and Teucrium oreades. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, headaches, and anxiety, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Teucrium × ochroleucum var. cebennense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
